---
title: "Partial Differential Equations II: Nonlinear PDEs and Modern Methods"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Partial Differential Equations II: Nonlinear PDEs and Modern Methods

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

Nonlinear PDEs, conservation laws, reaction-diffusion systems, and the modern theory of existence and regularity. The mathematical tools for modeling shock waves, pattern formation, turbulence, and complex dynamics.

## Table of Contents

1. Scalar Conservation Laws and Shock Waves
2. Systems of Conservation Laws
3. Reaction-Diffusion Systems
4. Hamilton-Jacobi Equations and Viscosity Solutions
5. Navier-Stokes Equations
6. Free Boundary Problems
7. Stochastic PDEs
8. Homogenization and Multiscale PDEs

---

## Chapter 1: Scalar Conservation Laws and Shock Waves

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Systems of Conservation Laws

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Reaction-Diffusion Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Hamilton-Jacobi Equations and Viscosity Solutions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Navier-Stokes Equations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Free Boundary Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Stochastic PDEs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Homogenization and Multiscale PDEs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
